steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage opens on Nixon's Watergate scandal, then pivots with "But Nixon's legacy is complex" — signaling a balanced view that weighs both failings and achievements (EPA, healthcare reform). The question asks for the main idea the passage conveys.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "It assesses a historical figure's significance by considering both his achievements and failings.": captures the balanced structure the passage explicitly builds. ✓
  • "It explains how a historical figure's reputation has improved significantly with the passage of time.": introduces a claim about how views change over time; the passage makes no such argument. ✗
  • "It argues that the seeming prominence of a historical figure is largely due to the actions of others.": wrongly attributes his historical significance to the people around him rather than to his own record. ✗
  • "It catalogs the most notable achievements of a historical figure.": ignores the Watergate scandal entirely, contradicting the passage's explicit acknowledgment of his failings. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
